steps.title: Identify the contextual contrast
steps.content:
The blank describes a previous state of the field, contrasted with the new concrete evidence and firm details that the analysis now provides.

The missing word should describe a prior state lacking such firm evidence — research based on guesses rather than data.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Speculative means based on conjecture rather than firm evidence — the perfect contrast with the new concrete findings.

Esoteric (obscure/specialized), authoritative (the opposite of what's needed), and solitary (alone) don't capture the contrast.

That matches Choice B — speculative.
